personal.name: Favour Oti
personal.title: SOFTWARE DEVELOPER
personal.bio: I build polished, user-focused web and mobile experiences from travel platforms to EV marketplaces with clean code and thoughtful design.
personal.aboutText: I'm a software developer pursuing my Master's in Software Engineering at Carleton University. I specialize in building performant, accessible web and mobile applications that solve real problems. With experience spanning travel tech, hospitality, EV platforms, and fintech, I bring a product-minded approach to every project. I care deeply about clean architecture, smooth interactions, and writing code that other developers enjoy working with.

experience.description: Developed and maintained responsive web applications for hospitality and travel clients. Built reusable component libraries, implemented booking flows, and optimized performance across multiple projects.
Built the cross-platform EV rental marketplace from the ground up. Integrated Google Maps for real-time vehicle tracking, implemented payment flows, and delivered both web and mobile interfaces.
Contributed to fintech dashboard interfaces, building data visualization components and ensuring responsive, accessible experiences across devices.
